mapper.select: SELECT A2.CL_CODE , A2.CL_CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNCLCODE A2
SELECT IF( COUNT(1), 'N', 'Y' ) AS checkYn FROM LETTCCMMNCODE WHERE CODE_ID = UPPER(#{codeId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LETTCCMMNCODE ( CODE_ID , CODE_ID_NM , CODE_ID_DC , USE_AT , CL_CODE , FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID , LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( UPPER(#{codeId}) , COALESCE(#{codeIdNm}, '') , COALESCE(#{codeIdDc}, '') , COALESCE(#{useAt}, 'N') , UPPER(#{clCode}) , SYSDATE() , #{UNIQ_ID} , SYSDATE() , #{UNIQ_ID} )
mapper.select: SELECT A2.CODE_ID , A2.CODE_ID_NM , A2.CODE_ID_DC , A2.USE_AT , A2.CL_CODE , B2.CL_CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNCODE A2 , LETTCCMMNCLCODE B2 WHERE A2.CL_CODE = B2.CL_CODE AND A2.CODE_ID = #{codeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE LETTCCMMNCODE SET CODE_ID_NM = COALESCE(#{codeIdNm}, '') , CODE_ID_DC = COALESCE(#{codeIdDc}, '') , USE_AT = COALESCE(#{useAt}, 'N') , LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = SYSDATE() , LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{UNIQ_ID} WHERE CODE_ID = #{codeId}
mapper.select: SELECT A2.CODE_ID , A2.CODE_ID_NM FROM LETTCCMMNCODE A2 WHERE A2.CL_CODE = #{clCode}
SELECT IF( COUNT(1), 'N', 'Y' ) AS checkYn FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = UPPER(#{codeId}) AND CODE = UPPER(#{code})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE ( CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM , CODE_DC , ORDER_BY , USE_AT , FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID , LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( UPPER(#{codeId}) , UPPER(#{code}) , COALESCE(#{codeNm}, '') , COALESCE(#{codeDc}, '') , #{orderBy} , COALESCE(#{useAt}, 'N') , SYSDATE() , #{UNIQ_ID} , SYSDATE() , #{UNIQ_ID} )
mapper.select: SELECT A2.CODE_ID , B2.CODE_ID_NM , A2.CODE , A2.CODE_NM , A2.CODE_DC , A2.ORDER_BY , A2.USE_AT , B2.CL_CODE FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE A2 , LETTCCMMNCODE B2 WHERE A2.CODE_ID = B2.CODE_ID AND A2.CODE_ID = #{codeId} AND A2.CODE = #{code} AND B2.USE_AT = 'Y'
SELECT CODE_ID, CODE, CODE_NM, CODE_DC FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE USE_AT = 'Y' AND CODE_ID = #{codeId} ORDER BY ORDER_BY
SELECT CODE_ID AS codeId, CODE AS code, CODE_NM AS codeNm, CODE_DC AS codeDc FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE USE_AT = 'Y' AND CODE_ID = #{codeId} ORDER BY ORDER_BY

SELECT CASE
WHEN CODE LIKE '01%' THEN 'REQ_SUB' WHEN CODE LIKE '03%' THEN 'JOIN_TIME'
WHEN CODE LIKE '02%' THEN 'REQ_SUB' WHEN CODE LIKE '04%' THEN 'JOIN_TIME'
WHEN CODE LIKE '08%' THEN 'JOIN_CNT' WHEN CODE LIKE '09%' THEN 'BEF_JOIN' WHEN CODE LIKE '05%' THEN 'S_REASON' WHEN CODE LIKE '06%' THEN 'S_EXPECT' WHEN CODE LIKE '07%' THEN 'S_APPR' END AS CODE_CATEGORY, CODE_ID, CODE, CODE_NM, CODE_DC FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = #{codeId} AND USE_AT = 'Y' AND (CODE LIKE '08%' OR CODE LIKE '09%' OR CODE LIKE '05%' OR CODE LIKE '06%' OR CODE LIKE '07%'
OR CODE LIKE '01%' OR CODE LIKE '03%'
OR CODE LIKE '02%' OR CODE LIKE '04%'
) ORDER BY CODE ASC
